items.title: Grammar focus
items.body:
Use the structure from the workbook. Pay attention to word order, negatives, and questions.

Examples:
• Do you want to sell your bicycle?
• 21- Do you buy ice cream every day? / candy / chocolate.
• St. Patrick
• St. Patrick brought Christianity
• to Ireland many years ago.

items.prompt: para a irlanda alguns anos atras.
Ele usou um trevo de três folhas para ensinar a Trindade.
items.answer: He used a three leaf-clover to teach the Trinity.

items.text: Do you want to buy an ice cream or some bubble gum?
Do you want to sell your bicycle?
21- Do you buy ice cream every day? / candy / chocolate.
